name: ffa-transcript-db
description: FFA Transcript Database — search transcripts and Teachable course content

scripts.dist: npm run build && mkdir -p _dist && zip -r _dist/ffa-transcript-db-v2.1.0.zip dist/ server/ package.json package-lock.json README.md LICENSE .env.example start.command start.sh start.bat -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.dist:electron:win: npm run build && CSC_LINK= WIN_CSC_LINK= electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:electron:all: npm run build && CSC_LINK= WIN_CSC_LINK= electron-builder --mac --win --linux
